key_structures.CardView: Flat view struct with 14 fields: id, state, glyph, token, title, stage, priority, progress, provider, elapsed_s, phase_name, phase_frac, failure_reason, exit_code
key_structures.Stats: Summary struct with total, by_state HashMap, avg_duration_s, success_rate_pct
key_structures.CardRenderer: Trait with 4 methods: render_section_header, render_card_row, render_progress, render_footer

patterns_discovered: Progressive terminal degradation: 5-level renderer hierarchy (Dumb→Basic→Extended→Full→TrueColor) selected by TermLevel
Trait-based abstraction: CardRenderer trait allows polymorphic dispatch without match statements at call sites
Data view pattern: CardView separates filesystem-independent data (Meta) from rendering logic
Terminal capability detection: TermCaps width/two_column cached; width re-queried per render cycle
Graceful fallback: SMP glyphs (U+1F0xx) have BMP-safe token fallbacks (e.g. ♠A)
Functional conversion: from_meta() maps Meta→CardView; caller enriches with AC plan data post-hoc
Stub-first extensibility: Basic/Extended/Full/TrueColor are skeleton implementations pending subtask-2-1 and subtask-3-x
gotchas_discovered: SMP playing-card glyphs may be absent on older cards; token field provides BMP-safe alternative
Terminal width must be queried per call (caps.width), not cached—terminal resize mid-session could cause layout overflow
Renderers never access filesystem; all data must flow through CardView struct before render_board()
Title field defaults to id if absent; caller must handle this fallback expectation
Empty provider string from runs is filtered to None (using .filter(|s| !s.is_empty()))
Phase progress (phase_frac) is 0.0 by default; caller must populate from AC plan JSON

approach_details.objective: Create render module scaffold with trait-based renderer dispatch and CardView/Stats data structures
approach_details.execution: All 5 renderer stubs created (Dumb fully implemented with ASCII output; Basic/Extended/Full/TrueColor declared as empty trait impls pending future subtasks)
test_coverage: from_meta_basic_fields: Verifies CardView construction from Meta with explicit fields
from_meta_title_defaults_to_id: Confirms fallback when title is absent
approach_details.integration_readiness: mod render registered in main.rs; ready for bop ui to import render::render_board()

recommendations: Implement BasicRenderer in subtask-2-1: add 8-color ANSI codes (state label colors, progress bar colors), +-- box borders
ExtendedRenderer (subtask-3-1): 16-color palette, ┌─┐│└─┘ single-line box drawing, left-accent ▌ stripes in state color
FullRenderer (subtask-3-2): 256-color, demoscene dithered fade (░▒▓) section headers, dice glyphs (U+1F3B2-1F3B6) for priority ranks
TrueColorRenderer: double-line box (╔═╗║╚═╝), RGB gradient progress bars, SMP card glyphs centered with fixedSize() (not scaleEffect())
Add color palette definitions to each renderer module (e.g. state→ANSI code map)
Handle narrow terminals (<40 cols): truncate titles with ellipsis, collapse progress bar, hide provider/elapsed on space constraint
Expand test suite per renderer: test render_section_header output format, render_card_row width handling, render_footer stats formatting
Cache TermCaps.width in render_board() caller if rendering same board multiple times (e.g. TUI loop); pass width explicitly to avoid re-querying
